description: Opening of a letter written by Daniel b. Azarya, Jerusalem, to Aviram ha-Kohen b. Yitzhak b. Furat. Daniel b. Azarya writes that he is sorry for their parting and is hoping to meet him again soon. (Gil, Palestine, vol. 2, 671-672, Doc. #359). VMR. NB: The current shelfmark is unknown.
description_he: פתיחת מכתב מדניאל בן עזריה, ירושלים, לאויראם הכהן בן יצחק בן פורת. מביע צער על הפרידה.
